_meta.notes: 113-seat Legislature. DPP supermajority. 73 district seats + 34 party-list + 6 indigenous. Source: CEC db.cec.gov.tw. District-level results pending — feature IDs must be verified against taiwan-atlas districts-10t.json.

seat_breakdown.notes: DPP: 40 district + 13 party-list + 3 indigenous (+ close allies TSP/NPP also broadly pan-green). KMT: 26 district + 11 party-list + 1 indigenous. TPP: 5 party-list. NPP: 3 district. PFP: 1 party-list. TSP: 1 district. IND: 4.
